basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow /Project Associate I Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Techniology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) Junior Research Fellow /Project Associate I Notification 2026 has been released on 09 May 2026 on the official website bits-pilani.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow /Project Associate I Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 28 years of age who have M.S./M.Sc./M.Tech. or equivalent degree in Physics or related disciplines are eligible to apply for these Junior Research Fellow /Project Associate I vacancies. The email application process for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow /

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

qualification.details: M.S./M.Sc./M.Tech. or equivalent degree in Physics or related disciplines with a minimum of 60% marks (or equivalent CGPA). Preference to NET/GATE qualified candidates. Prior experience in Computational Physics and Machine Learning is preferred. Basic knowledge of MATLAB or Python is desirable.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
